# DSLRaid Verification Graph

<!-- generated by scripts/verificationdocgen.sh; do not edit by hand -->

Source: `lisp/agent/verification.lisp`

Form: `(verify daemon (lint) (unit-test) (integration-test) (conformance) (release-check))`

CI is evidence generation, not final authority.
The generated workflow is `.github/workflows/verification.yml`.

## Nodes

| Node | Needs | Evidence | Commands |
| --- | --- | --- | ---: |
| lint | none | Source shape, workflow lint, Go lint, Rust fmt/clippy. | 6 |
| unit-test | lint | Rust workspace unit test evidence. | 1 |
| integration-test | unit-test | Viewer test and build evidence. | 3 |
| conformance | integration-test | Unified DSLRaid semantic and generated-output gate. | 1 |
| release-check | conformance | Generated workflow, docs index, and artifact freshness. | 3 |

## Contract

- Common Lisp is the executable verification SSOT.
- GitHub Actions YAML is generated evidence plumbing.
- Every generated workflow change must pass workflowgen check.
- Release checks must prove docs, workflows, and artifacts are fresh.
